subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion! We sent forth the respected Iranian gentlemen, Mahmud Mirza and his companion, under protection and safekeeping [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس قدیم حضرات ایرانیها محمود میرزا و رفیقش را محفوظا مصونا فرستادیم شما
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
